question: Clone tensor a to b, add 1e-10 to b[0,0]. Use isclose and allclose to compare with rtol=1e-5, atol=1e-8.
expected_output:
isclose result: tensor([[True, True, True, True],
        [True, True, True, True],
        [True, True, True, True]])
allclose result: True
template:

torch.manual_seed(42)
a = torch.randn(3, 4)
b = a.clone()
b[0, 0] += 1e-10
isclose = torch.???(???, ???, rtol=1e-5, atol=1e-8)
allclose = torch.???(???, ???, rtol=1e-5, atol=1e-8)
print(f"isclose result: {isclose}")
